created.description: The date and time when the collection was created.

s3Bucket.description: The S3 bucket where the Zarr is stored.

path.description: The prefix within the bucket where the Zarr is stored. Must end with '/' but not start with it and must contain a Zarr group.

status.description: Only INGESTED collections can be used in Process API.

ingestionErrors.description: Error message in case ingestion of the Zarr or any of its arrays failed.

crs.description: Native CRS of the Zarr. See also [Sentinel Hub CRS support](https://docs.planet.com/develop/apis/processing/#crs-support).

envelope.description: The area of coverage of the ingested Zarr collection, defined in its native CRS.

width.description: Width of the ingested Zarr collection in pixels.

height.description: Height of the ingested Zarr collection in pixels.
